name: Google Ads
description: Google Ads API v23 — manage campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, budgets, and run performance reports via GAQL queries

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all Google Ads customer accounts accessible to the authenticated user. Returns customer IDs and descriptive names. Use this first to find the customer_id needed for all other tools.

tools.name: search
tools.description:
Run a Google Ads Query Language (GAQL) query to search for campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, or pull performance metrics. Examples:
- List campaigns: SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, campaign.status FROM campaign
- Campaign performance: SELECT campaign.name, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS
- Ad group performance: SELECT ad_group.name, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions FROM ad_group WHERE campaign.id = 123
- Keywords: SELECT ad_group_criterion.keyword.text, metrics.clicks FROM keyword_view WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS
- Search terms: SELECT search_term_view.search_term, metrics.clicks FROM search_term_view WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS
- Ads: SELECT ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.headlines FROM ad_group_ad

customer_id.description: Google Ads customer ID (without hyphens, e.g. '1234567890')

query.description: GAQL query string. Example: SELECT campaign.name, metrics.clicks FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS

page_token.description: Token for fetching next page of results

tools.name: search_stream
tools.description: Run a GAQL query using streaming — returns all results at once without pagination. Better for large result sets. Same query syntax as google-ads-search.

tools.name: campaign_mutate
ad_group_mutate
ad_mutate
keyword_mutate
budget_mutate
asset_mutate
tools.description: Create, update, or remove reusable Google Ads assets: images, text assets, YouTube video assets, lead form assets, call assets, sitelinks, callouts, structured snippets, and other asset types supported by the Google Ads API. Use campaign_asset_mutate, customer_asset_mutate, asset_group_asset_mutate, or ad assets on ads to attach created assets where needed.

tools.name: campaign_asset_mutate
tools.description: Attach, update, or remove assets at campaign scope. Use for campaign-level sitelinks, callouts, lead forms, images, and other asset links. Operations target campaignAsset resources.

tools.name: customer_asset_mutate
tools.description: Attach, update, or remove assets at customer/account scope. Use for account-level assets such as sitelinks, callouts, lead forms, calls, and other supported asset links. Operations target customerAsset resources.

tools.name: ad_group_criterion_mutate
tools.description: Create, update, or remove ad group criteria beyond keywords: audiences, placements, topics, demographics, listing groups, and other ad-group targeting criteria. keyword_mutate is a convenience alias for keyword criteria on this same endpoint.

operations.description: Array of ad group criterion operations (create/update/remove)

tools.name: campaign_criterion_mutate
tools.description: Create, update, or remove campaign-level criteria: locations, languages, negative keywords, audiences, and other campaign targeting or exclusions.

tools.name: user_list_mutate
tools.description: Create, update, or remove remarketing/customer match user lists. Use this for audience resources that can be targeted from campaigns or ad groups.

tools.name: conversion_action_mutate
tools.description: Create, update, or remove conversion actions for tracking leads, purchases, signups, page views, and other conversion goals.

tools.name: asset_group_mutate
tools.description: Create, update, or remove Performance Max asset groups. Use together with asset_group_asset_mutate to attach images, logos, headlines, descriptions, videos, and other assets to a Performance Max campaign.

tools.name: asset_group_asset_mutate
tools.description: Attach, update, or remove assets inside Performance Max asset groups. Operations target assetGroupAsset resources.

operations.description: Array of asset group asset operations (create/update/remove)

tools.name: bulk_mutate

mutateOperations.description: Array of typed operations (campaignBudgetOperation, campaignOperation, adGroupOperation, adGroupAdOperation, adGroupCriterionOperation, etc.)

partialFailure.description: If true, allows partial success. If false (default), all operations fail if any one fails.
